overall.description: A slow first-person walk through a futuristic space station lobby featuring a large rotating holographic space station display. The scene showcases high-end game engine graphics with neon lighting, polished floors, and sci-fi architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic spaceport lobby with holographic ship display

agents.ego_description: slowly walking toward the holographic display while observing the rotating space station schematic

notable_agents.action: two figures standing near the back wall observing the holographic display

entered.detail: large rotating 3D hologram of a space station with green glowing wireframe lines
circular glowing white light fixtures embedded in the dark polished floor
red stanchion ropes marking a queue or restricted pathway along the left side
wall-mounted displays showing data and graphics on the left wall
small group of characters standing near the far end of the lobby

segments.scene_description: The camera moves slowly forward through a sleek, futuristic lobby dominated by a massive rotating holographic space station display suspended in the center. The environment features dark polished floors with illuminated circular panels, red rope barriers lining the left side, and sparse NPCs standing in the background near digital wall screens. The lighting is predominantly cool neon green and blue from the hologram against the dark metallic architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a sleek, futuristic lobby centered around a massive rotating holographic display. It begins by gliding across dark polished floors accented with illuminated circular panels, while red rope barriers line the left side of the path. As the camera advances, the cool neon green and blue light from the central hologram casts a glow over the dark metallic architecture. The scene then expands to reveal sparse NPCs standing in the background near glowing digital wall screens before the camera continues its steady approach toward the heart of the station.
